title: Exact and Approximate Nearest-Neighbor Indexes · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved trace contains a plausible ANN recall, latency, and resource experiment with one ingestion, normalization, chunking, lexical, embedding, index, filter, fusion, reranking, context, generation, citation, authorization, latency, or recovery defect; identify the first failed stage before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in ANN recall, latency, and resource experiment and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through predic…
objectives: Build an exact flat-search oracle on a bounded corpus for correctness, recall comparison, and changed-filter tests.
Explain and tune HNSW construction, search breadth, graph degree, recall, latency, memory, updates, and deletion behavior.
Explain coarse partitioning, probes, product or scalar quantization, training data, compression loss, and rebuild requirements.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Ann Capacity Selection
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: rag-ann-capacity-selection-1gh3g4" that uses case 7203 to compare exact, HNSW, IVF, and quantized indexes with recall, latency, memory, and filter evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Ann Capacity Selection.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Rag Ann Capacity Selection into observable performance evidence. For RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Ann Capacity Selection, keep Rag Ann Capacity Selection connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-ann-capacity-selection-1gh3g4
# Competency: rag-ann-capacity-selection.
# Case 7203: an enterprise retrieval migration canary.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall.
def evidence_rag_ann_capacity_selection_1gh3g4(vectors: int = 10000, dimensions: int = 384, exact_recall: float = 0.96, latency_ms: float = 18.0, memory_mb: int = 96, filtered: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1gh3g4 = "1gh3g4-4g3hg1-7203"
    assert evidence_variant_1gh3g4
    evidence_axes_1gh3g4 = (
        "corpus1gh3g4",
        "query4g3hg1",
        "tenant7203",
        "index1gh3g47203",
        "prompt4g3hg17203",
        "evaluation72031gh3g4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1gh3g4)) == 6
    if vectors <= 0 or dimensions <= 0:
        return False, 0.0, "index-shape"
    if not 0.0 <= exact_recall <= 1.0:
        return False, exact_recall, "recall-range"
    if latency_ms <= 0.0 or memory_mb <= 0:
        return False, latency_ms, "resource-measurement"
    if not filtered:
        return False, exact_recall, "filter-recall"
    utility = exact_recall / latency_ms
    assert utility > 0.0
    return True, round(utility, 5), "ann-tradeoff"
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
